home.heroTitle: Welcome to The Church in El Paso
home.heroSubtitle: A community of faith in El Paso. Everyone is welcome here.
home.announcementsSubtitle: Stay up to date with what's happening.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Stay up to date with everything happening at The Church in El Paso.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Upcoming services, gatherings, and special events.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Watch or listen to recent messages from The Church in El Paso.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Find your place — there's a community for everyone.

visit.title: Plan Your Visit
visit.subtitle: We're glad you're considering joining us. Here's everything you need to know before you come.
visit.expectBody: Our services last about 90 minutes and include worship, prayer, and a message from the Bible. Come as you are — there is no dress code.
visit.parkingBody: Free parking is available at both locations.
visit.kidsBody: We have programs for children of all ages during the Sunday service so parents can worship without distraction.
visit.questionsSuffix: anytime — we'd love to hear from you.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn who we are, what we believe, and what drives us as a community of faith in El Paso.

give.title: Offering
give.subtitle: Your generosity makes ministry possible. Thank you for partnering with The Church in El Paso to serve El Paso and beyond.
give.inPerson: You can also give in person during any service. Checks made payable to The Church in El Paso.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out anytime.
